payload.answer: Three atomic memory cards were created from the input, each representing a distinct, traceable fact with appropriate confidence and minimal entity resolution.

entity_resolution.reason: No duplicate or conflicting entities detected; all entities are uniquely referenced in context.

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable
A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state

details: All statements preserved as current and durable.
